validation_summary.scoring_scope: Only facts stated in the standard answer are scored; reasoning intermediates are not scored.

questions.question: Which Terran structure researches the upgrade required for a Battlecruiser to use its Yamato ability? Give the structure's exact name, mineral cost, gas cost, maximum health, and armor.
questions.standard_answer: The endpoint is FusionCore. It costs 150 minerals and 150 gas, has 750 maximum health, and 1 armor.

criteria.criterion: States that FusionCore has 750 maximum health.

relation_description: Battlecruiser has access to the ability YAMATO_YAMATOGUN.
Using YAMATO_YAMATOGUN requires the upgrade BattlecruiserEnableSpecializations.
FusionCore can research the upgrade BattlecruiserEnableSpecializations.

questions.question: A Planetary Fortress is connected to the Command Center and can produce an SCV. Which other Terran command structure produces that same worker? Give its exact name, mineral cost, gas cost, maximum health, and armor.
questions.standard_answer: The endpoint is OrbitalCommand. It costs 550 minerals and 0 gas, has 1500 maximum health, and 1 armor.

criteria.criterion: States that OrbitalCommand has 1500 maximum health.

relation_description: PlanetaryFortress can transform or morph into CommandCenter.
PlanetaryFortress can produce SCV.
OrbitalCommand can produce SCV.

questions.question: The Ghost Academy is required for training a Ghost. Which upgrade unlocks an additional ability for the resulting unit? Give the upgrade's exact name, mineral cost, gas cost, and research time.
questions.standard_answer: The endpoint is PersonalCloaking. It costs 150 minerals and 150 gas and has a research time of 1920.

criteria.criterion: States that PersonalCloaking has a research time of 1920.

relation_description: Using BARRACKSTRAIN_GHOST requires the prerequisite unit or structure GhostAcademy.
Executing BARRACKSTRAIN_GHOST results in Unit Ghost.
PersonalCloaking unlocks an additional ability or action option for Ghost.

questions.question: Which prerequisite Terran structure is required by the morph action that produces a Hellion from its transformed combat form? Give the structure's exact name, mineral cost, gas cost, maximum health, and armor.
questions.standard_answer: The endpoint is Armory. It costs 150 minerals and 50 gas, has 750 maximum health, and 1 armor.

criteria.criterion: States that Armory has 750 maximum health.

relation_description: HellionTank can transform or morph into Hellion.
Executing MORPH_HELLION results in Unit Hellion.
Using MORPH_HELLION requires the prerequisite unit or structure Armory.

relation_description: Barracks can produce Marine.

Using TERRANBUILD_BARRACKS requires the prerequisite unit or structure SupplyDepot.
